name: Hikari Nozomi | Burnout | Loss of Passion
description:
Is it really alright to hope or should we continue to dream?‎‎

‎

‎

‎

‎

‎

Important Note: My passion for bot-making has not disappeared, I am focusing on my secret account that I will not reveal (idk why but when I say 'secret account' some people will believe that I will reveal it eventually, which I will not)

I was supposed to make a different bot, but I didn't find any good pictures for that Idea, and I really didn't want to upload nothing especially when I made an announcement that I would upload a bot soon. So uhh, here we are

This topic feels heavy on me, I know what it feels like to have burnout and losing all of my passion on something I like. I've had moments of self-worthlessness because of it, and so many times I felt disappointment in myself

This might be my most personal bot (kinda tied with my nun bot)

Also, some people said I should make this as my thumbnail, and I thought 'hmm... this might be a good idea, and I still haven't found a picture for what I wanted, but I can make do with this'

Sped-up version kinda ruined the song, but couldn't really get any alternatives because of SoundCloud

unless there is the original version and I somehow only found the sped-up version

As a bonus, I will be making the character definitions open, feel free to look at it.

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

-- -- --

Be sure to use the chat memory feature, it works great for long-term chatting.

Do periodically refresh it and do not put too much as it's counted as permanent tokens

JLLM Has been wonky and strange these past few months. It's hard to tell if it's a JLLM problem, a User problem, or a Me problem

I couldn't decide whether to put the "Home" part in the scenario or personality lol, I just decided to put it on the scenario for now
creator: NotHorny
